lastVerifiedEvidence: Epic status is Ready For JKS with no blocking pending decisions.
Definition of done and guardrails copied into GOAL.md.
Previous call transcription foundation evidence retained in .jks/.
Slice 1 accepted: source-aware transcription alert payloads, alert runtime flags, JSONL logs, run-status alert/log fields, and focused tests.
Slice 2 accepted: Terraform transcription alert mode, Slack secret injection, IAM read scope, preconditions, and CloudWatch log URL env wiring.
Slice 3 accepted: gold_coast.job_run_status shared query surface, transcription raw run-status DDL, smoke SQL 006-009, and operator docs.
Slice 4 accepted: focused tests 26/26, full data-lake tests 77 passed / 2 skipped, terraform fmt-check/validate, git diff --check, goal-state JSON validation, and static safety checks.

First controlled ECS smoke on image 7525cb10 exited 0 and posted the launch-window alert, but run status redacted the CloudWatch URL. Added a CloudWatch-console allowlist, reran focused tests 27/27 and full suite 78 passed / 2 skipped, and will redeploy a new image.
guardrails: Do not change transcription generation, transcript table grain, core GHL refresh behavior, or privacy constraints.

Do not expose transcript text, raw audio, provider payloads, recording URLs, API keys, Slack webhook URLs, emails, phone numbers, contact examples, or raw PII in Slack, docs, logs, run-status artifacts, or evidence.
Athena table locations must point only at historical runs/ prefixes.
nextAction: Commit CloudWatch URL sanitizer fix, rebuild/push image, apply Terraform, rerun controlled transcription ECS smoke, run smoke SQL, and capture live acceptance evidence.
